articles.title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
articles.summary: Brent crude sinks by a tenth after Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.

articles.title: Japan reveals new name for 40C-and-hotter days after blistering summer
